data.title: Update project docs for stack-aware architect-foundation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update CLAUDE.md and existing docs to reflect stack-aware architect-foundation and hashFiles() CI skeletons.

TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — static documentation asset.

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md (EDIT — if architect-foundation behavior notes exist)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No stale references to non-stack-aware architect-foundation behavior
  Verify: ! grep -rn 'empty placeholder.*commands\|manually.*look.*up.*CONFIGURATION' CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | grep -vi 'generic\|stack-aware\|pre-fill'
